name: Get-FormatData

options.name: -PowerShellVersion
options.description: Specify the version of PowerShell this cmdlet gets for the formatting data. Enter a two digit number separated by a period.

options.name: -TypeName
options.description: Specifies the type names that this cmdlet gets for the formatting data. Enter the type names. Wildcards are permitted.

description: Gets the formatting data in the current session.
